textures.noise: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,...') (Use CSS noise generator or library)

layout_strategy.alignment: Strict Left Alignment for Text, Center for Hero Visuals

buttons.base: font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold border border-green-500/50 bg-transparent text-green-400 hover:bg-green-500 hover:text-black hover:border-green-500 transition-all duration-75 rounded-none

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333] rounded-none p-6 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: bg-transparent border-b border-[#333] focus:border-[#00FF41] rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-lg font-mono placeholder:text-neutral-700 outline-none transition-colors

hero_background.usage: Use as a background-image on the Landing Page Hero Section with opacity-10 and mix-blend-mode: overlay

reality_report_glitch.usage: Use as a subtle header background for the AI Reality Report page, heavily desaturated and darkened.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: `npm install lucide-react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge date-fns react-day-picker`
THEME_SETUP: Ensure `darkMode: 'class'` is set in tailwind.config.js and 'dark' class is applied to html/body by default. NO LIGHT MODE TOGGLE.
FONT_SETUP: Import 'Space Grotesk' and 'JetBrains Mono' in index.css from Google Fonts.
GLOBAL_CSS: Add `.font-mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }` and `.font-heading { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; }`.
COMPONENTS: Do not use rounded corners. Set `--radius: 0rem` in globals.css.
CHART_CONFIG: When using Recharts, ensure the 'Productive' data key always maps to color #00FF41 and 'Break/Other' maps to #262626.
VOICE_UI: Implementing the 'Voice-First' interface requires a visual indicator. Use a CSS animation of vertical bars (simulating a waveform) that animates when `isListening` state is true.
AI_REPORT: The GPT report should render as a 'typewriter' effect, revealing text character by character for dramatic effect.
AUTH_PAGE: Simple, centered card with 'Google Sign In' button. Button should be white with black text and Google 'G' icon, for maximum contrast against the black background.
DASHBOARD_LAYOUT: Use a high-density grid. Top row: Key Metrics (Productive Hours, Reality Score). Middle: Main Timeline Visualization. Right/Bottom: Project List & Quick Actions.
CRITICAL: Always use `data-testid` attributes for all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only for floating overlays/toasts.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons. Use Lucid React icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
